questions.question: Compare and contrast the 'Chalk and Talk' method with a PowerPoint Presentation Process. Describe the advantages and disadvantages of each approach, and provide an example of when each would be suitable. (10 marks)

What are the key factors that you should consider when designing a PowerPoint Presentation Process to support a Graph Theory topic? Provide at least two examples of how to apply these factors in your own practice. (10 marks)

Describe a scenario where a 'Chalk and Talk' method would be more suitable than a PowerPoint Presentation Process. Explain how you would adapt the 'Chalk and Talk' method to meet the needs of your students. (10 marks)
